title: Compatibility check always returns true - no actual validation
description: The method isCompatibleWithProtocol(withName:version:) always returns true (line 291). The TODO comment confirms this is unimplemented. This means any client regardless of protocol version will be accepted. A client running an incompatible protocol version could cause undefined behavior, message parsing errors, or security bypasses if newer protocol versions add security-critical fields.
vulnerable_code: public func isCompatibleWithProtocol(withName name:String, version: String) -> Bool { return true }
recommendation: Implement proper version comparison: check that the remote protocol name matches and the version is within a compatible range.
